description: A new community center has opened in the Bologna Pasubio network, and residents have requested a new bus stop. Add a bus stop with the ID 'new_community_stop' to the network definition in '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml' on a valid lane. Update the bus route in '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_busses.rou.xml' to include a 30-second stop at 'new_community_stop'. Configure the simulation in '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg' to generate stop statistics at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml'. After running the simulation, create a report at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/new_stop_report.txt' documenting the 'Target_Edge' where the stop was placed and the 'Arrival_Time' recorded in the stop statistics.
